tasks.subject: Task 1: Fix stack detection — add next.config.mjs to 4 skills
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update Next.js stack detection in build, test, update, and review agents to recognise next.config.mjs.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/shared-build-agent/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/shared-test-agent/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/shared-update-agent/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/shared-review-agent/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] shared-build-agent table row includes next.config.mjs
- [ ] shared-build-agent error message includes .mjs
- [ ] shared-test-agent stack detection includes next.config.mjs
- [ ] shared-update-agent stack detection includes next.config.mjs
- [ ] shared-review-agent stack detection includes next.config.mjs
- [ ] No other lines changed

**Verify:** `grep -n "next\.config" skills/shared-build-agent/SKILL.md skills/shared-test-agent/SKILL.md skills/shared-update-agent/SKILL.md skills/shared-review-agent/SKILL.md` → every Next.js detection line mentions .mjs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/shared-build-agent/SKILL.md", "skills/shared-test-agent/SKILL.md", "skills/shared-update-agent/SKILL.md", "skills/shared-review-agent/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'next\\.config' skills/shared-build-agent/SKILL.md skills/shared-test-agent/SKILL.md skills/shared-update-agent/SKILL.md skills/shared-review-agent/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["next.config.mjs in build-agent table", ".mjs in build-agent error message", "next.config.mjs in test-agent", "next.config.mjs in update-agent", "next.config.mjs in review-agent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Fix slash-format skill references in 7 skills
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace all stack/skill-name slash-format references with correct stack-skill-name dash format.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/shared-build-agent/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/shared-test-agent/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/shared-update-agent/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/shared-add-error-handling/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/shared-add-pagination/SKILL.md`
- Modify: `skills/shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No remaining slash-format skill name references (excluding @nestjs/ npm imports)
- [ ] All callers/related-skills sections use dash-format names
- [ ] No other lines changed

**Verify:** `grep -rn "nextjs/\|vite-react/\|fastapi/\|nestjs/\|shared/" skills/shared-build-agent/SKILL.md skills/shared-test-agent/SKILL.md skills/shared-update-agent/SKILL.md skills/shared-add-error-handling/SKILL.md skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md skills/shared-add-pagination/SKILL.md skills/shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md | grep -v "@nestjs/"` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/shared-build-agent/SKILL.md", "skills/shared-test-agent/SKILL.md", "skills/shared-update-agent/SKILL.md", "skills/shared-add-error-handling/SKILL.md", "skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md", "skills/shared-add-pagination/SKILL.md", "skills/shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -rn 'nextjs/|vite-react/|fastapi/|nestjs/|shared/' skills/shared-build-agent/SKILL.md skills/shared-test-agent/SKILL.md skills/shared-update-agent/SKILL.md skills/shared-add-error-handling/SKILL.md skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md skills/shared-add-pagination/SKILL.md skills/shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md | grep -v '@nestjs/'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No slash-format skill references remaining", "Callers and related-skills use dash format"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Fix file upload security in shared-validation-patterns
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expand extension blocklist and add URL-decode protection to path traversal check.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Extension blocklist includes Windows executables, scripts, Unix shells, PHP variants, Java types, libraries
- [ ] Path traversal refinement calls decodeURIComponent wrapped in try/catch
- [ ] Path traversal check rejects ./ relative paths
- [ ] No other lines changed

**Verify:** `grep -A 30 "File validation" skills/shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md | head -35` → shows decodeURIComponent and expanded blocklist

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -A 30 'File validation' skills/shared-validation-patterns/SKILL.md | head -35", "acceptanceCriteria": ["decodeURIComponent in traversal check", "try/catch around decodeURIComponent", "startsWith('./')\ check present", "expanded blocklist with com, scr, pif, msi, vbs, ps1, hta, bash, zsh, csh, php3, php4, php5, phtml, jsp, jspx, jnlp, jar, so, dylib"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Add security audit step to shared-update-agent
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add pnpm audit (Node) and pip-audit (FastAPI) steps after successful build, report-only.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/shared-update-agent/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Node steps include audit after build-agent dispatch
- [ ] FastAPI steps include audit after build-agent dispatch
- [ ] Audit is report-only (no auto-rollback)
- [ ] FastAPI audit gracefully skips if pip-audit not installed
- [ ] Reporting section includes Security advisories block description
- [ ] No other lines changed

**Verify:** `grep -n "audit" skills/shared-update-agent/SKILL.md` → shows pnpm audit, pip-audit, Security advisories

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/shared-update-agent/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'audit' skills/shared-update-agent/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pnpm audit --audit-level=high in Node steps", "pip-audit in FastAPI steps", "graceful skip for missing pip-audit", "Security advisories in reporting section"]}
```
